svg.title: 200 vibe-coding days, Gruvbox theme
svg.desc: Public aggregate of Dmitriy's AI coding activity from June 1, 2025 through July 5, 2026: 200 active days, 1,076 sessions, 7,066 prompts, 59,061 tool calls, and 4.73B tokens.
